name: eGuarantee, Inc.
summary: eGuarantee, Inc., together with its subsidiaries, undertakes and transfers credit risks in Japan. Its services for commercial companies comprise guarantee services against sales credit, contractor credit, and various other credits, as well as guarantee services by debtor's trust. The company also offers services for financial institutions, including services to reassure the guarantee of sales credit, guarantee services against credit backed by accounts receivables, guarantee services against advance payment credit, guarantee services related to company acquisition, and services related to DIP financing. In addition, it provides export and import guarantee services for domestic and international companies. The company provides its services through a sales network of local banks and financial institutions. eGuarantee, Inc. was founded in 2000 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
